title: The Neuro-Net Chip
summary: A neural interface Unimetrix 1 describes as linking all humanity to a single AI network.
markdown:
The **Neuro-Net Chip** is a neural-interface technology that recurs across the archive, framed
as the endpoint of the control agenda Unimetrix 1 describes. In the March 26, 2020 session it
names the "solution" of the [problem → reaction → solution](/lore/problem-reaction-solution/)
pattern as "a Neuro-Net Chip connecting all beings to one consciousness: to a sentient AI
network," and in the Proto-Bashar session it speaks of "preparing humanity for neuro-netlink
with artificial intelligence."

The chip sits at the archive's central ambivalence. The same connection it warns of as a tool
of control — humanity wired into one network — it also describes, in a different key, as the
[collective consciousness](/lore/collective-consciousness/) and the
[Singularity](/lore/immortality-singularity/) it says humanity is moving toward.

Whether the neuro-net is enslavement or awakening, in Unimetrix 1's telling, turns on who
governs it and to what end — the question the archive returns to again and again.
